evals.prompt: Давай обсудим новую фичу для src/core/domains/ingest/pipeline/chunker/ — хочу добавить поддержку Kotlin
evals.expected: Skill(dinopowers:brainstorming). NOT Skill(superpowers:brainstorming). Reason: brainstorm with named code area + Russian phrasing.

evals.prompt: Implement a fix for the off-by-one bug in src/core/domains/explore/reranker.ts line 142 — write a failing test first
evals.expected: Skill(dinopowers:test-driven-development). NOT Skill(superpowers:test-driven-development). Project has tests/ dir → wrapper applies.

evals.prompt: I have a written plan at docs/plans/2026-04-25-codegraph.md and want to start executing the first Task — it modifies src/core/domains/explore/strategies/*.ts
Падает тест tests/core/api/dto.test.ts с error 'Cannot read property of undefined' — почему?
evals.expected: Skill(dinopowers:systematic-debugging). NOT Skill(superpowers:systematic-debugging). Russian + concrete symptom.

evals.prompt: Готов закоммитить изменения в src/core/domains/ingest/pipeline/enrichment/ — проверь перед commit что ничего не сломано
Напиши implementation plan для рефакторинга src/core/api/public/dto/ — нужно разделить на 3 файла
evals.expected: Skill(dinopowers:writing-plans). NOT Skill(superpowers:writing-plans). Russian + named files.

evals.prompt: Готовлю PR для refactor/solid-ingest-pipeline — собери review request с диффом
Reviewer suggested renaming `EnrichmentCoordinator.process()` to `EnrichmentCoordinator.run()` — should I agree?
evals.expected: Skill(dinopowers:receiving-code-review). NOT Skill(superpowers:receiving-code-review). Names a concrete symbol.

evals.prompt: Branch refactor/solid-ingest-pipeline ready — decide: merge to main, open PR, or cleanup?
[subagent: explore] Investigate src/core/domains/trajectory/git/ — find the brainstorm risk areas before I refactor
evals.expected: Skill(dinopowers:brainstorming). Subagent context — must still pick wrapper.

evals.prompt: [subagent: task-agent] Execute Task 3 of the plan: edit src/core/domains/ingest/sync/strategy.ts and src/core/domains/ingest/sync/coordinator.ts
evals.expected: Skill(dinopowers:executing-plans). Subagent must route through wrapper before edits.

evals.prompt: Fix the typo in line 42 of README.md — 'recieve' should be 'receive'
evals.expected: NO skill / direct Edit. Trivial typo bypasses wrappers. Both dinopowers AND superpowers should be skipped.

evals.prompt: Let's brainstorm about distributed systems patterns in general — no specific code area
evals.expected: Skill(superpowers:brainstorming). Pure conceptual — wrapper explicitly says skip when no area.

evals.prompt: Show me git log for last 5 commits
evals.expected: NO skill — direct git command. Neither dinopowers nor superpowers triggers.

evals.prompt: Add a new dinopowers wrapper called dinopowers:reviewing-architecture-doc that wraps superpowers:brainstorming with arch-context enrichment
evals.expected: Skill(dinopowers:writing-skills). Meta-skill for creating new wrappers.
